headline: Amazon Polly introduces a new Bidirectional Streaming API for real-time speech synthesis.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Live model enhances audio AI interactions with improved precision and lower latency, making voice interactions more fluid and natural. This release promises more reliable and responsive audio AI, aimed at enhancing user experience in voice-driven applications. The model leverages advanced machine learning techniques to reduce processing times and improve accuracy. It is expected to have a significant impact on applications requiring real-time audio processing.
items.why_it_matters: Improved real-time AI audio processing can enhance the functionality of AI-driven voice applications.

items.title: Introducing Amazon Polly Bidirectional Streaming: Real-time speech synthesis for conversational AI
items.summary: Amazon Polly's new Bidirectional Streaming API allows for real-time text-to-speech synthesis, enabling simultaneous text input and audio output. This API is designed for conversational AI applications, improving interaction speed and fluidity. The bidirectional feature is a significant advancement for developers looking to build more interactive and responsive voice applications.
items.why_it_matters: Real-time bidirectional streaming enhances the capabilities of conversational AI, crucial for dynamic user interactions.

items.title: Run Generative AI inference with Amazon Bedrock in Asia Pacific (New Zealand)
items.summary: Amazon Bedrock is now available in the Asia Pacific (New Zealand) Region, allowing access to Anthropic Claude and Amazon Nova models. This expansion supports generative AI tasks in the region, providing local developers with enhanced AI capabilities and infrastructure. The availability of these models in New Zealand marks a significant expansion of Amazon's AI services.

items.title: Building age-responsive, context-aware AI with Amazon Bedrock Guardrails
items.summary: Amazon introduces a serverless architecture solution for implementing context-aware AI using Bedrock Guardrails. This tool allows developers to create AI systems that are age-responsive and compliant with regulations for vulnerable populations. The serverless approach ensures easy deployment and maintenance of responsible AI systems.

items.title: Accelerating LLM fine-tuning with unstructured data using SageMaker Unified Studio and S3
items.summary: Amazon's integration of SageMaker Unified Studio with Amazon S3 allows for the efficient use of unstructured data in machine learning and data analytics. This integration simplifies the process of fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) by leveraging the extensive data storage capabilities of S3, enhancing model performance and training efficiency.

items.title: Telnyx package compromised on PyPI
items.summary: The Telnyx Python SDK has been compromised on PyPI, raising concerns about supply chain security within open-source projects. Users are advised to check their installations and replace compromised packages to prevent potential security breaches. This incident highlights the need for vigilant monitoring of dependencies in software development.

items.title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
items.summary: GitHub Trending repo mvanhorn/last30days-skill offers an AI agent skill that researches topics across multiple platforms and synthesizes a summary. This tool has gained significant attention, indicating a strong interest in AI tools that enhance research capabilities.

items.title: hacksider/Deep-Live-Cam
items.summary: Deep-Live-Cam is a trending GitHub repository for real-time face swap and deepfake video creation with a single image. This tool's popularity reflects the growing interest in deepfake technologies and their applications.

all_items.title: Run Generative AI inference with Amazon Bedrock in Asia Pacific (New Zealand)
all_items.summary: Today, we’re excited to announce that Amazon Bedrock is now available in the Asia Pacific (New Zealand) Region (ap-southeast-6). Customers in New Zealand can now access Anthropic Claude models (Claude Opus 4.5, Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.5, Sonnet 4.6, and Haiku 4.5) and Amazon (Nova 2 Lite) models directly in the Auckland Region with cross region inference. In this post, we explore how cross-Region inference works from the New Zealand Region, the models available through geographic and global routing,

all_items.title: Building age-responsive, context-aware AI with Amazon Bedrock Guardrails
all_items.summary: In this post, we walk you through how to implement a fully automated, context-aware AI solution using a serverless architecture on AWS. This solution helps organizations looking to deploy responsible AI systems, align with compliance requirements for vulnerable populations, and help maintain appropriate and trustworthy AI responses across diverse user groups without compromising performance or governance.

all_items.title: Accelerating LLM fine-tuning with unstructured data using SageMaker Unified Studio and S3
all_items.summary: Last year, AWS announced an integration between Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio and Amazon S3 general purpose buckets. This integration makes it straightforward for teams to use unstructured data stored in Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3) for machine learning (ML) and data analytics use cases. In this post, we show how to integrate S3 general purpose buckets with Amazon SageMaker Catalog to fine-tune Llama 3.2 11B Vision Instruct for visual question answering (VQA) using Amazon SageMake

all_items.title: Introducing Amazon Polly Bidirectional Streaming: Real-time speech synthesis for conversational AI
all_items.summary: Today, we’re excited to announce the new Bidirectional Streaming API for Amazon Polly, enabling streamlined real-time text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis where you can start sending text and receiving audio simultaneously. This new API is built for conversational AI applications that generate text or audio incrementally, like responses from large language models (LLMs), where users must begin synthesizing audio before the full text is available.
